---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "A collection of my data analytic projects throughout this year - conducted individually and collectively"
listing:
  contents: list
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 200px
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
Use the **category filters** on the right hand side to browse projects by topic. Click any project card to explore the full analysis.
:::
